effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], reveal the top of your deck, and put it into your hand if it's a normal unit. (Return it to its original spot if it's not)
flavorTextEN: This happy premonition, let me change it into reality♪

effectEN:
Play this if you have a vanguard with "Thegrea" in its card name!
[AUTO]:When this card is put into your order zone, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
[ACT](Order Zone):If you have a grade 3 vanguard with "Thegrea" in its card name, COST  [put this card into drop], choose up to one grade 3 or greater card with "Thegrea" in its different card name from your vanguard from your hand, and ride it as [Stand].
flavorTextEN: Both justice and integrity are detestable false pretenses.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and put it on the bottom of their deck.
flavorTextEN: Hit!!

nameEN: Great Sword of the Ferocious Black Flame, Obscudeid
effectEN:
[AUTO](RC)/(GC):If your Order Zone has a three or more Set Order, this unit gets [Power]+5000 and [Shield]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
[Glitter]-"Eva" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Eva" in its card name)
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by a card's ability, if your Order Zone has three or more Research cards, when this unit attacks, this unit battles every unit in your opponent's front row.
flavorTextEN: This strike will cut through your regrets

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked while boosted, if your damage zone has three or more face down cards, COST  [put this unit into your soul], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Won't you try a little harder? I'll provide support!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from deck by your vanguard's ability, until end of turn, this unit gets "Boost", and [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Greatsword of the Ferocious Black Flame, Obscudeid
effectEN:
[AUTO](RC/GC):If your Order Zone has a three or more Set Orders, this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
[Glitter]-"Eva" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Eva" in its card name)
[CONT](RC):If this unit was placed on (RC) by your card's ability this turn, and your Order Zone has three or more Research cards, when this unit would attack, it battles all of your opponent's front row units.
flavorTextEN: I'll bet all of my pride on this one attack.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard's clan is only one of any of the clans, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], choose a card with only one clan that is the same clan as your vanguard from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: An organization needs to purify itself by excising what's redundant.

nameEN: Wisdom of the Beginning to Open the World
effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Draw two cards, choose two cards from your hand, call each card if its grade is equal to or less than your vanguard, and discard it if it isn't.
flavorTextEN: The light of the Regalia is said to break through the darkness and illuminate the future.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a unit with only <Genesis> for its clan, look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to two cards from among them, put them into your soul, and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO]:When this card is put from soul into your drop during your turn, if you have a vanguard with "Minerva" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this unit to (RC).
flavorTextEN: A master of resonance for the soul that goes beyond time.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], your opponent puts all of their rear-guards in the same column as this unit on the bottom of his or her deck in any order, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of the turn.  ("If you persona rode" is active, even if you activate persona ride except on normal ride)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from deck by your vanguard's ability, until end of turn, this unit gets "Boost", and [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: I'll swing the sword that I trust wherever we are.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one "Divine Sister, Spumone" from among them, call it to (RC) in the same column as this unit, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](Front Row RC):When your vanguard is placed on (VC) by the [RevolDress] ability, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a grade 3 or greater unit, COST  [Soul Blast (1) card with "RevolForm" in its card name], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The fighting techniques of the silver wolf, its very will, have been handed down from generation to generation.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, choose one of your back row rear-guards, and move it to (GC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is revealed for your drive check, you may call this card to an open (RC). If you do, this unit gets "Boost" until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Good! You got a nice card!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your soul has a grade 3 or greater card, this unit gets "Boost", and [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: It feels a little prickly, right? That's the weight of your sins♪

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have three or more grade 3 or greater units, COST  [retire this unit], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and put it on the bottom of their deck.
flavorTextEN: No matter the reason, you shall not pass here.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your [Critical]2 or greater vanguard attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and that unit and this unit get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: So you're planning the ambush here? Allow me to join you.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):When this unit would be retired for the cost of the ability of your vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, it may be regarded as retiring two rear-guards.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit is retired by the ability of your vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name during your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, choose one of your "Blaster Dark" on (RC), and until end of turn, it gets "[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, COST  [discard a card from hand], and this unit performs drive checks until end of that battle. At the end of battle, retire this unit.".
flavorTextEN: The determination thunders forth. For those who challenge themselves.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by a card's ability, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], Counter Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a unit with "Solrairon" in its card name, choose a "Sage of Elixir, Eliron" from your soul, and call that card and this card to (RC).
[AUTO](RC):When a normal unit is revealed by the ability of your vanguard with "Solrairon" in its card name, this unit gets "[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, COST  [retire this unit], and Counter Charge (1)." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When a normal unit is revealed by the ability of your vanguard with "Solrairon" in its card name, until end of turn, this unit gets "Boost", and [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):When this unit would be retired for the cost of the ability of your vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, it may be regarded as retiring two rear-guards.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit is retired by the ability of your vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name during your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, choose one of your "Blaster Dark" on (RC), and until end of turn, it gets "[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, COST  [discard a card from hand], and this unit performs drive checks until end of that battle. At the end of battle, retire this unit.".
flavorTextEN: The determination thunders forth. For those who challenge themselves.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by a card's ability, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Now, who do I need to beat up!

nameEN: Great Sword of Fierce Black Flame, Obscudeid
effectEN:
[AUTO](RC/GC):If your Order Zone has a three or more Set Orders, this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
[Glitter]-"Eva" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Eva" in its card name)
[CONT](RC):If this unit was placed on (RC) by your card's ability this turn, and your Order Zone has three or more Research cards, when this unit would attack, it battles all of your opponent's front row units.
flavorTextEN: I'll bet all of my pride on this one attack.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked while boosted, if your damage zone has three or more face down cards, COST  [put this unit into your soul], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Won't you try a little harder? I'll provide support!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard's clan is only one of any of the clans, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], choose a card with only one clan that is the same clan as your vanguard from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: An organization needs to purify itself by excising what's redundant.

nameEN: Wisdom of Beginning That Cleared The World
effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Draw two cards, choose two cards from your hand, call each card if its grade is equal to or less than your vanguard, and discard it if it isn't.
flavorTextEN: The light of the Regalia is said to break through the darkness and illuminate the future.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is revealed during your drive check, you may call this card to an open (RC). If you do, this unit gets "Boost" until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Bravo! Looks like you've pulled a nice card!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your ride phase, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & put this card on the bottom of deck], and draw a card.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top two cards of your deck, choose a card from among them, put it into your hand, and put the rest on the top or bottom of the deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, look at the top card of your deck. If your vanguard is [Stand], you may put the card you looked at into the soul.
[AUTO](RC):When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Sis is watching! I can't afford to look uncool!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by your card's ability, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If this unit was placed from deck, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], draw a card, and this unit gets "Boost" until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Responding to the request, the dragon shoots an arrow of light.

effectEN: [CONT](VC):When you would ride from your ride deck, you may "Soul Blast (1)" instead of "Choose a card from hand, and discard it".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), look at the top card of your deck, and put it on the top or bottom of your deck. If you put a card on the bottom, look at the top card of your deck.
flavorTextEN: If you don't like it, just burn it with our flames.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Gramgrace" in its card name, Soul Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard's clan is only «Genesis», look at the top three cards of your deck, choose up to one card from among them, put it into your soul, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, if you have a vanguard with "Minerva" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], choose a card from hand or drop, and put it into your soul. If you put a card from hand, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Thegrea" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], search your deck for up to one grade 3 or 2 set order, reveal it and put it into hand, and shuffle the deck.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, COST  [retire another rear-guard], choose one of your [Glitter] units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) other than by a unit card's ability, if you played a normal order this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card with grade less than or equal to your vanguard from among them and reveal it, call it to (RC) if it is a unit card, and put it into hand if it is a normal order. Shuffle the deck.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a grade 3 or greater card, if you have four or more units, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Choose two of your rear-guards, and they get [Power]+5000 until end of turn. At the end of that turn, COST  [discard a card from hand], choose an "Uplifting Hymn" from your drop, and put it into hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your vanguard is "Apex Ruler, Bastion", this unit gets [Shield]+5000 for every two of your grade 3 units. (Includes this unit)
flavorTextEN: Ascertain the necessities, and swiftly make preparations.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):During your turn, all of your grade 3 units get [Power]+2000.
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :At the end of the battle that your drive check revealed a grade 3, COST  [discard a card from your hand], choose one of your rear-guards, [Stand] it, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Fulfilling one's mission is the pride of knights. Raise it high above the heavens.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Your wish is for power? If so, say it honestly.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you have three or more grade 3 units, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn, and if you persona rode this turn, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The actors and the stage have been assembled. Now, shall we begin the performance?

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have three or more grade 3 units, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and all of your grade 3 units get "Boost" until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: It's overwhelming power surged as it approached.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], [Stand] this unit, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Still around~? Hurry up and disappear~!

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1) grade 3]!
Choose one of your opponent's rear-guards. Your opponent puts all of their rear-guards in the same column as that rear-guard on the bottom of their deck.
flavorTextEN: The mystical powers dwell in the sword. Hence this is a holy judgement acknowledged by the deities.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)]!
Perform all of the effects below according to the number of your grade 3 units.
•2 or more - Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•3 or more - Draw a card.
•4 or more - Choose one of your vanguards, and it gets drive +1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: To fulfill one's mission without fail. That is the oath of the knights.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (2) & Soul Blast (1)], choose a card from your hand, and call it to (RC). If you called a grade 3, draw two cards.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have three or more grade 3 units, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Standing on par with the strongest blade. As though lauding their noble justice.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & Soul Blast (1)], you choose a column, and your opponent puts all of their rear-guards in that same column on the bottom of their deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: Go ahead. I will take care of the obstacles!

nameEN: Heavenly Bow of Edifying Guidance, Refuerzos
effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If you persona rode this turn, this unit gets "Boost".
[AUTO](Back Row RC)1/Turn :When your other unit [Stand] by a card's effect, [Stand] this unit.
flavorTextEN: I'm right behind you. You know the meaning of that, right?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have four or more grade 3 rear-guards, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card. If you persona rode this turn, you may have "this unit get [Power]+5000/[Critical]+1 until end of turn" instead of drawing a card.
flavorTextEN: The prideful wings along with the knights, aim for the perpetual peace.

nameEN: Heavenly Staff of Kind Intention, Cortese
effectEN: [AUTO]:When your drive check reveals this card, you may call this card to an open (RC). If you do, this unit gets "Boost" until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :If you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], reveal up to one [Critical] trigger or [Front] trigger from your hand and put it on the top of your deck, and this unit gets drive +1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: A new revelation slumbers within the forms that are already known.

effectEN: If you have three or more units, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Knights, fear nothing and press forth!

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Put this unit into your soul], choose one of your grade 3 rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Even if it is covered in mud, a will of gold will never dull.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):This unit cannot be chosen by your opponent's card effects.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, Counter Charge (1)/Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Resist no matter what. There is a chance of victory in adversity.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, if your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress", COST  [retire this unit], and Counter Charge (1) or Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), choose a card with "Blaster" in its card name from your soul, and you may call it to (RC).
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Retire three rear-guards], choose up to two of your opponent's rear-guards, retire them, and this unit gets [Power]+10000/[Critical]+1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The abyss dragon written of in legends, declaring that there are times when despair surpasses the light.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have three or more grade 3 units, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and this unit gets [Critical]+1 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Be it patients from the skies or injured from the ground, I'll be sure to heal them all.

effectEN: If you have three or more grade 3 units, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+20000 until end of that battle. (Including GC)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: The Hour of Holy Judgement Cometh
effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (2)]!
Draw two cards, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn!
flavorTextEN: Feel the full weight of my faith!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Kneel down over there!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is retired for your card's cost, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], all of your units with "Blaster" in their card names get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Remorse changes into a blade of revenge.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your hand has four or less cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at five cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one grade 3 unit card from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & retire this unit], choose one of your grade 3 units, and it gets drive +1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top card of your deck, if it is a unit card, you may call it to a (RC) in the same column as this unit. (If you did not call, return it)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & Soul Blast (1)], you choose a column, and your opponent puts all of their rear-guards in that same column on the bottom of their deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: Go ahead. I will take care of the obstacles!

nameEN: Heavenly Staff of Kind Intention, Colthese
effectEN: [AUTO]:When your drive check reveals this card, you may call this card to an open (RC). If you do, this unit gets "Boost" until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: Choose a "Hexaorb Sorceress" on your (VC) or (RC), and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle. COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and it gets +40000 instead of +10000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: If you have three or more grade 3 units, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+20000 until end of that battle. (Including GC)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this with COST  [discard a card from your hand]!
[CONT](Order Zone):All of your grade 3 rear-guards get "Boost".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have four or more grade 3 rear-guards, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card. If you persona rode this turn, you may have "this unit get [Power]+5000/[Critical]+1 until end of turn" instead of drawing a card.
flavorTextEN: The wings of pride and the knights are both aiming for a distant peace.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & [Rest] any number of other rear-guards], until end of that battle, this unit performs drive check, and gets [Power]+5000. At the end of that battle, if three or less units were [Rest] for this cost, choose three cards from your hand, discard them, and if one or less units were [Rest] for this cost, choose two cards from your hand, discard them. (Drive check is performed after guardian's call)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is retired for your card's cost, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], all of your units with "Blaster" in their card names get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Remorse changes into a blade of revenge.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1) & reveal a [Critical] trigger or [Front] trigger from your hand]!
If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, you draw a card, and put the card revealed for this cost on the top of your deck.
flavorTextEN: Breaking through the dark night, and welcoming the blinding radience of the morning sun.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your unit [Stand] by a card's ability, COST  [[Rest] this unit], choose one of your other rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, if your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your and your opponent's vanguards have the same grade, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your other rear-guards, that unit and this get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Discerning the vital point in a split second, and administering aid with the smallest amount of medication needed.

nameEN: Divine Protection of the Abyss Dragon
effectEN: Choose one of your vanguards with "Blaster" in its card name being attacked, and until end of that battle, it gets [Power]+15000. Then, choose 1 of your rear-guards, and you may retire it. If you retired, it gets [Power]+15000.
flavorTextEN: The era of the myth. The abyss dragon granted despair determination.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle your unit attacked, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and perform all of the effects below according to the trigger units revealed for the drive check of that battle.
•[Critical] - Choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and put it on the bottom of their deck.
•[Front] - Choose one of your grade 2 or less rear-guards, and [Stand] it.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & retire this unit], choose one of your grade 3 units, and it gets drive +1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The unshakeable bond of the Cloud Knights is their greatest weapon.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this with COST  [discard a card from your hand]!
[CONT](Order Zone):All of your grade 3 rear-guards get "Boost".
flavorTextEN: There is no way we can retreat. We shall put a stop to them here!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top card of your deck, if it is a unit card, you may call it to a (RC) in the same column as this unit. Return it to its original spot if you do not call)
flavorTextEN: Then, let us be on our way. Follow my lead!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your unit [Stand] by a card's ability, COST  [[Rest] this unit], choose one of your other rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Leave this place to me! Go and rampage to your heart's content!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, if there are no other rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn, and at the end of that battle, [Stand] this unit. (Including your opponent's rear-guards)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (1) & [Rest] this unit], look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one grade 3 or greater unit card with different card name from this unit from among them, call it to (RC), and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your vanguard is "Apex-surpassing Sword, Bastion Prime", this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit [Stand] by your card effect, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](Front Row RC):When this unit is [Stand] by your vanguard's ability, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and draw a card.
[CONT](Back Row RC):During your turn, all of your other rear-guards in the same column as this unit get [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Even if it's a one in a ten thousand chance, there's no way I'd fail to hit it.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit is [Stand] by your vanguard's ability, choose one of your other rear-guards, and that unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your grade 2 or greater units being attacked, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle. If you chose a grade 4, it gets +20000 instead of +10000.

nameEN: Heavenly Incitation Above the Clouds, Blagar
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your hand has four or less cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at five cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one grade 3 unit card from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Maintaining the numerical advantage, is the key to controlling the melee.

nameEN: Light that Shines upon the Truth
effectEN: Choose a "Hexaorb Sorceress" on your (VC) or (RC), and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle. COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and it gets +40000 instead of +10000.
flavorTextEN: The prophetic abilities to reveal the future, is to reclaim it with the power of humans.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & [Rest] any number of other rear-guards], until end of that battle, this unit performs drive check, and gets [Power]+5000. At the end of that battle, if three or less units were [Rest] for this cost, choose three cards from your hand, discard them, and if one or less units were [Rest] for this cost, choose two cards from your hand, discard them. (Drive check is performed after guardian's call)
flavorTextEN: This strike entrusted with my conviction is definitely not light!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, if your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: If everyone worked together, we can even use such magic!

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1) & reveal a [Critical] trigger or [Front] trigger from your hand]!
If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, you draw a card, and put the card revealed for this cost on the top of your deck.
flavorTextEN: Breaking through the dark night, and welcoming the blinding radiance of the morning sun.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, choose one of your other grade 3 or greater units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

Choose one of your vanguards with "Blaster" in its card name being attacked, and until end of that battle, it gets [Power]+15000. Then, choose one of your rear-guards, and you may retire it. If you do, that vanguard gets [Power]+15000.
flavorTextEN: The age of myths. The hell dragon is granted despair and resolution.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle your unit attacked, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and perform all of the effects below according to the trigger units revealed for the drive check of that battle.
•[Critical] - Choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and put it on the bottom of their deck.
•[Front] - Choose one of your grade 2 or less rear-guards, and [Stand] it.
flavorTextEN: Two miracles. Waiting impatiently for the moment they coincide.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (1) & [Rest] this unit], look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one grade 3 or greater unit card with different card name from this unit from among them, call it to (RC), and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: Overlooking the state of the battle, and sending out a suitable amount of firepower.
